# QA Plan: Sprint 6 — Opening Knowledge Cards

**Date**: 2026-05-30
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 2 stories across opening-knowledge-cards epic
**Engine**: Web App — TypeScript 5 · Vue 3 · Vite 5 · vue3-chessboard · stockfish@16.0.0
**Sprint File**: production/sprints/sprint-6.md

---

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|-------|------|------------------------|------------------------------|
| S6-02 OpeningKnowledgeCard.vue + integration | UI + Logic | Unit test — `tests/unit/opening-knowledge-cards/opening-knowledge-card.test.ts` | Playwright screenshot: card below opening header; collapse/expand |
| S6-03 10 ECO content cards | Config/Data | Data validation test — `tests/unit/opening-knowledge-cards/opening-knowledge-cards-data.test.ts` | Manual tone review — AC-08 no-judgment check |

---

## Automated Tests Required

### S6-02: OpeningKnowledgeCard.vue — UI + Logic

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/opening-knowledge-cards/opening-knowledge-card.test.ts`
**Gate level**: BLOCKING — story cannot be marked Complete without passing tests.

**What to test** (from GDD §5 Edge Cases + story ACs):

- AC-01: `eco = 'C50'` → card panel renders; body text contains 'Italian'
- AC-02: `eco = null` → no card panel DOM element present (EC-01)
- AC-03: `eco = 'A99'` (no card) → no card panel DOM element present (EC-02)
- AC-04: `matchMedia` mock `matches = false` (mobile) → panel hidden by default; click toggles to visible
- AC-05: `matchMedia` mock `matches = true` (desktop) → panel visible by default; click toggles to hidden
- AC-06: card body containing `<script>alert(1)</script>` → no script element in DOM; text escaped (EC-03)
- `parseInlineMarkdown('**bold** and _italic_ text')` → `[{text:'bold', bold:true}, {text:' and '}, {text:'italic', italic:true}, ...]`
- `parseInlineMarkdown('plain text')` → `[{text:'plain text', bold:false, italic:false}]`
- EC-04 ephemeral toggle: mounting a fresh component with `eco = 'C50'` → `isExpanded` resets to default each time

**Edge cases from GDD §5**:
- EC-01 and EC-02 produce identical DOM output (no placeholder element either case)
- EC-03: HTML in body is not rendered as markup
- EC-04: toggle state does not persist between component unmount/remount

**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests

---

### S6-03: ECO Content Cards — Config/Data

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/opening-knowledge-cards/opening-knowledge-cards-data.test.ts`
**Gate level**: BLOCKING

**What to test**:

- AC-07: `Object.keys(OPENING_CARDS).length >= 20`
- AC-07 completeness: all 10 Sprint 2 backlog ECO codes present — C20, D10, E62, E21, B06, A80, D70, B90, B70, C25
- AC-08: no card body contains forbidden phrases — `'should have played'`, `'you missed'`, `'bad choice'`
- Structural: each entry has non-empty `eco`, `name`, `body` strings
- Structural: `eco` key matches the `eco` field value within the card
- Body length: each body ≤ 600 characters (proxy for ≤ 4 sentences)

**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### S6-02: OpeningKnowledgeCard.vue — UI

**Verification method**: Browser manual walkthrough + screenshot
**Who must sign off**: developer self-review
**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/evidence/s6-02-knowledge-card-evidence.md` (screenshot + notes)

Checklist:
- [ ] Start game → play 1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 → resign or finish → navigate to Review
- [ ] Opening header shows "Italian Game" text
- [ ] Knowledge card panel appears directly below opening header
- [ ] Card body renders bold/italic correctly (no raw `**` visible)
- [ ] Desktop (≥ 768px): card expanded by default
- [ ] Click opening header → card collapses; click again → expands
- [ ] Mobile (< 768px): card collapsed by default
- [ ] Tap header → card expands; tap again → collapses
- [ ] Keyboard: Tab to header, Space → toggle; Enter → toggle
- [ ] Review a game with rare/unknown opening → no card element in DOM (inspect element to verify)
- [ ] Inspect card DOM → no raw HTML or script tags in rendered output

### S6-03: ECO Content Cards — Tone Review

**Verification method**: Manual read-through of all 10 new card bodies
**Who must sign off**: developer self-review
**Evidence to capture**: Note in QA sign-off document that tone review passed

Checklist:
- [ ] Read all 10 new card bodies
- [ ] Confirm no judgment phrases: "should have", "you missed", "bad choice", "mistake" (about opening choice)
- [ ] Confirm each card describes strategic plan, not player quality
- [ ] Confirm each card body ≤ 4 sentences
- [ ] Verify ECO codes against `lookupSync` output during dev (especially approx. codes)

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off for Sprint 6:

1. App launches to home screen without crash
2. New game starts → play moves → game ends → Review screen loads
3. Italian Game recognized → opening header appears → knowledge card appears below header
4. Knowledge card collapses/expands on click at desktop width
5. Knowledge card absent when opening is unknown (rare/random moves)
6. All 324 existing unit tests still pass (regression check: `npx vitest run`)
7. `npx vite build` completes without TS errors

---

## Playtest Requirements

No playtest sessions required for this sprint. Opening knowledge cards are a data-display feature — automated tests and manual verification are sufficient.

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 6

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified via automated test OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] `tests/unit/opening-knowledge-cards/opening-knowledge-card.test.ts` exists and passes (S6-02, BLOCKING)
- [ ] `tests/unit/opening-knowledge-cards/opening-knowledge-cards-data.test.ts` exists and passes (S6-03, BLOCKING)
- [ ] Manual evidence at `production/qa/evidence/s6-02-knowledge-card-evidence.md` (advisory)
- [ ] Tone review documented in QA sign-off (S6-03 AC-08)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint`)
- [ ] QA sign-off: APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS
- [ ] No regressions in existing 324 tests
- [ ] Story files updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
